name: Dwarf remains
rationale: Pure quest item used only in Dwarf Cannon, with no skill or combat function, so it belongs only in Quests.

name: Toolkit
rationale: Quest item used only in Dwarf Cannon to repair the cannon during the quest. No ongoing use, so Quests only.

name: Steel cannonball
rationale: A terminal ammo output fired from the dwarf multicannon. Under the inputs-only rule it leaves Mining + Smithing and sits in Range and Slayer, where the cannon is used.

name: Nulodion's notes
rationale: Quest item used only in Dwarf Cannon. The examine text mentions cannon ammo construction, but it is not a Construction item, so Quests only.

name: Ammo mould
rationale: A reusable Smithing tool used to cast cannonballs, so it is an input to Mining + Smithing. Dropped Quests because it is a permanent skilling tool, not a quest keepsake.

name: Instruction manual
rationale: The dwarf multicannon reference book with no skill or combat function and not a deployable part, so Misc.

name: Cannon base
rationale: A deployable dwarf multicannon part used during ranged combat and slayer tasks, so Range and Slayer. Dropped Quests because it is a functional combat tool.

name: Cannon stand
rationale: A deployable dwarf multicannon part, so Range and Slayer. Dropped Misc and Quests as noise.

name: Cannon barrels
rationale: A deployable dwarf multicannon part that fires the cannonballs, so Range and Slayer. Dropped Misc and Quests as noise.

name: Cannon furnace
rationale: The final deployable dwarf multicannon part, so Range and Slayer. Dropped Misc and Quests as noise.

name: Railing
rationale: Quest item used only in Dwarf Cannon to repair a fence. No ongoing use, so Quests only.

name: Holy table napkin
rationale: Quest item used only in Holy Grail. No ongoing use, so Quests only.

name: Magic whistle
rationale: Quest item used only in Holy Grail. No ongoing use, so Quests only.

rationale: Quest item used only in Holy Grail. No ongoing use, so Quests only.

name: Holy grail

rationale: Quest item used only in Clock Tower. No ongoing use, so Quests only.

rationale: Quest item used only in Clock Tower. No ongoing use, so Quests only.
